meta.title: Everything you need to know about Russia's S-400 Air Defense System
meta.description:
Trying something new here... a brief summary of everything you need to know about complex defense topics, starting with the S-400.

Russia’s S-400 Triumf, often referred to as the SA-21 Growler within NATO circles, is widely touted as the most capable air defense system in the world. 

But while the S-400 is indeed very capable, it's not quite the stealth-defeating powerhouse that it's made out to be. 

You can learn more about the S-400 here: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/the-s-400-myth-why-russias-air-defense-prowess-is-exaggerated/
